# AI Findability Audit

> Analyze your website's AI-readability and get actionable recommendations to appear in Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Google AI Overviews.

## Overview

The AI Findability Audit uses the A3 Framework to measure website discoverability to AI answer engines. 69% of searches now end without a click as users get answers directly from AI.

## The A3 Framework: Five Pillars

### 1. Machine-Readability (0-20 points)
Clean HTML versus JavaScript bloat. AI agents need to extract content efficiently.

### 2. Semantic Depth (0-25 points)
Heading hierarchy, Schema.org structured data, and semantic HTML elements.

### 3. Agent Discovery (0-20 points)
llms.txt, robots.txt with AI crawler directives, XML sitemaps.

### 4. Programmatic Access (0-20 points)
OpenAPI specifications, API documentation, code examples.

### 5. Context Efficiency (0-15 points)
Concise content, TL;DR sections, low marketing fluff, optimal token usage.

## API Documentation

### POST /api/audit
Submit a website for analysis.

Request:
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com",
  "email": "user@example.com"
}
```

Response:
```json
{
  "auditId": "abc-123",
  "status": "completed"
}
```

### GET /api/audit?id={id}
Retrieve audit results with full A3 Framework scores.

### GET /api/audit?leaderboard=true
Get live leaderboard rankings.

## Website Structure

- `/` - Home page with audit tool
- `/leaderboard` - Live rankings of audited sites
- `/methodology` - A3 Framework explained in detail
- `/api` - API documentation
- `/audit/{id}` - Individual audit results page

## Technical Implementation

- Next.js 16 with App Router
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Framer Motion for animations
- A3 Framework scoring algorithm

## Contact

Built by Claw Constellation
https://github.com/claw-constellation/ai-findability-audit
